title: Crispy Pan-Fried Veal Cutlets
description: A simple yet elegant dish that brings out the earthy flavor of veal. This recipe is perfect for a quick dinner.
instructions: Season the veal cutlets with salt and pepper.
Dredge the veal cutlets in flour, shaking off excess.
Dip the floured veal cutlets in the beaten egg, making sure they're fully coated.
Roll the egg-coated veal cutlets in breadcrumbs, pressing the crumbs onto the meat to help them stick.
Heat butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the breaded veal cutlets to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
Remove the veal cutlets from the skillet and place them on a plate.
Reduce heat to medium and add a bit more butter to the skillet if needed.
Add the crispy veal cutlets back to the skillet and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until heated through.
